action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP-L/14 8 epochs gives test worst-region 0.4566, overall 0.6455. Major improvement from B/16. Each epoch ~5 min. ~9.2h budget left. Africa is worst region. Analysis: Need to push further. Options: (1) more epochs with longer schedule, (2) WiSE-FT (weight ensemble with zero-shot CLIP), (3) stronger augmentations, (4) higher resolution. Given time budget, train CLIP-L/14 with more epochs (15-20) + slightly stronger augs + maybe class balanced sampling. Also could try region-balanced sampling to boost Africa. Decision: Train CLIP-L/14 longer (15 epochs) with current pipeline + add region-balanced sampling to improve worst-region performance. Current run took 43min for 8 epochs, so 15 epochs = ~80min. Reasonable.
